_comment: Merge the windows block below into tauri.conf.json bundle.windows after obtaining an Authenticode certificate. Do not commit private keys or passwords.
_steps: Purchase or create a code-signing certificate (EV or standard Authenticode for Windows).
Install the cert in Current User > Personal or Local Machine > Personal certificate store.
List thumbprints: Get-ChildItem Cert:\CurrentUser\My | Format-List Subject, Thumbprint
Set certificateThumbprint to the 40-char hex thumbprint (no spaces).
Set timestampUrl to your CA's RFC 3161 timestamp server (DigiCert example above).
Rebuild: npm run build:tauri — Tauri signs MSI/NSIS during bundle.
